SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

THIS SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT is made on the 1st day of January 2024

BETWEEN:

1. Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC No.: S2345678B), of 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 567890, and reachable at +65 9123 4567, email: twm@fictmail.sg

2. Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC No.: S3456789C), of 456 Jurong West Street 72, #07-89, Singapore 640456, and reachable at +65 9234 5678, email: aishah.abdullah@mycompany.sg

AND

3. Rama Holdings Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 201912345W), a company incorporated in Singapore with its registered address at 789 Raffles Place, #10-11, Singapore 048621, and contact number +65 9876 5432.

WHEREAS the Parties have agreed to enter into this Agreement to regulate their rights and obligations as shareholders of the Company.

AND WHEREAS the Parties acknowledge the investment sum of SGD 1,500,000 has been agreed for the initial capital commitment.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF this Agreement has been duly executed by the Parties hereto on the day and year first above written.
